text: Guy Orlov's data dashboard provided valuable insights that helped us enhance the programme and improve the accessibility of our venue for Deaf Gathering Festival 2023.
author: Jonny Cotsen, CEO of Deaf Gathering, Wales, September 2023

text: Guy Orlov's effort in R Studio, combined with a technical AI tool for exploring data outcomes, provided excellent guidance. I greatly appreciated his contributions to the research data results.
author: Arjun Shrestha, PhD Student, University of Birmingham, November 2024
